## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's content strategy and performance for Homebase, and align on next steps for the engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has published 112 new blog posts for Homebase, generating 11% of total blog traffic (51K clicks, 6M impressions) in Oct 7-29](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Team presented a data-driven content opportunity analysis identifying 3,100 potential new topics with 29M monthly search volume](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [Agreed to shift focus from high volume to high-value, conversion-focused content while maintaining some broader topics for authority](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Next steps: GrowthX to propose engagement options balancing editorial quality, programmatic content, and strategic planning](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [112 new blog posts published, 148 total pieces worked on](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Generated 11% of total blog traffic Oct 7-29 (51K clicks, 6M impressions)](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [8,600 keywords ranking per SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Team has 6,000 additional content ideas in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

### Content Opportunity Analysis

  - [Analyzed 34,000 keywords from competitors](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Created 3,100 potential content assignments](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=718.0)
  - [Total potential search volume of 29M monthly (US desktop)](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Assignments scored on relevance, difficulty, and volume](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [Opportunity to create high-quality briefs and assignments at scale](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Moving from high volume to high-value, conversion-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Maintain some broader "pink cloud" topics (5-10%) for overall site authority](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [Focus on specific, high-intent topics related to Homebase offerings](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Balance editorial quality improvement with programmatic content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)

### Engagement Optimization

  - [Explore adding lead capture forms/widgets to blog posts (2-3 week project)](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Develop nurture programs for captured leads](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Consider broader content topics once core funnel is optimized](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to share meeting highlights in AI Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)
  - [Nick and Kerry to review and indicate priorities](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)
  - [GrowthX to propose engagement options at different scopes/sizes](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)
  - [Explore quick-win lead capture implementation on blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Continue improving editorial quality while expanding into programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/wr6NFfj2x1aMQE52VGcSg3w7YBqA_4ys?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
